name: JayDeBeApiArrow
description: A Python module providing a DB-API v2.0 interface to JDBC drivers, utilizing Apache Arrow to deliver 20x speed improvements for data transfer and type conversion.

name: Auto-Annotation of Pathology Images
description: A human-in-the-loop pipeline utilizing deep learning models like U-Net and Mask R-CNN, to automate the segmentation and annotation of structures in pathology whole slide images.

name: Plants vs Zombies (Java)
description: Java game project with multi-level difficulties and smooth animation, powered by LibGDX framework
